jira.description: Jira issue tracking — search, create, update, comment, transition issues

github.description: GitHub operations — PRs, issues, code review, repo management
github.fork_note: Monorepo — run from npm; clone itsariuk/servers and build src/github/ to use your fork locally

confluence.description: Confluence — search pages, retrieve ADRs, runbooks, onboarding docs

context7.description: Live documentation lookup — Rails gems, Python packages, Go modules. Use resolve-library-id then query-docs.

sequential-thinking.description: Structured chain-of-thought for architectural decisions and complex debugging
sequential-thinking.fork_note: Monorepo — run from npm; clone itsariuk/servers and build src/sequentialthinking/ to use your fork locally

memory.description: Persistent memory — retains project context, decisions, and patterns across sessions
memory.fork_note: Monorepo — run from npm; clone itsariuk/servers and build src/memory/ to use your fork locally

filesystem.description: Filesystem operations — set path to your projects root
filesystem.fork_note: Monorepo — run from npm; clone itsariuk/servers and build src/filesystem/ to use your fork locally

playwright.description: Browser automation — Rails system tests, Python web app testing, Go HTTP handler verification

exa-web-search.description: Web search — research obscure bugs, CVEs, library changelogs, stack-specific solutions

laraplugins.description: Laravel plugin discovery — search packages by keyword, health score, Laravel/PHP version compatibility. Use with laravel-plugin-discovery skill.

evalview.description: AI agent regression testing — snapshot behavior, detect regressions. Useful for Python AI/ML services. API key optional for deterministic checks. Install from fork: pip install git+https://github.com/itsariuk/eval-view
evalview.fork_note: Install from fork: pip install git+https://github.com/itsariuk/eval-view

_comments.usage: Copy the servers you need to your ~/.claude.json mcpServers section
_comments.env_vars: Replace YOUR_*_HERE placeholders with actual values
_comments.stack: Tuned for enterprise Rails / Python / Go development
_comments.disabling: Use ECC_DISABLED_MCPS=github,context7,... to disable bundled ECC MCPs during install/sync
_comments.context_warning: Keep under 10 MCPs enabled to preserve context window
_comments.forks: All forkable MCPs point to github:itsariuk/* forks. Upstream repos in fork_upstream fields.
_comments.removed: Removed: firecrawl, supabase, omega-memory, vercel, railway, clickhouse, fal-ai, browserbase, browser-use, devfleet, token-optimizer
